riddles.prompt: I take passengers around the city. I rhyme with lab. Find me!

To catch or grab something quickly. Find the word!

Really cool and awesome. Find the word!
Feeling unhappy or gloomy. Find it!

Short for medicine. Find it!

Move fast on your legs! Find the word!
Having a great time and enjoying yourself. Find the word!
